privileged_info_summary: The task sets up a Flask authentication service running in a Docker container named 'auth-service' at /home/ga/debug-auth. A packet capture sidecar named 'sniffer' must be added to the docker-compose.yml to capture traffic to a file at captures/capture.pcap. The sniffer must share the auth-service network namespace and use Linux capabilities NET_ADMIN and/or NET_RAW instead of privileged mode. The minimum PCAP file size threshold for task completion is 100 bytes.
